section_title: Where, by the conditions of the bailment, the goods are to be kept or to
content:
158. Where, by the conditions of the bailment, the goods are to be kept or to
by bailor of
be carried, or to have work done upon them by the bailee for the bailor, and
necessary
expenses the bailee is to receive no remuneration, the bailor shall repay to the bailee
the necessary expenses incurred by him for the purpose of the bailment.
Restoration
